cases.prompt: Add unit tests for the new discount calculation — how many boundary cases do I need?
cases.notes: Deciding boundary-case count for a calculation change is the core unit-test-design trigger.

cases.prompt: この決済モジュールの変更にどこまでテストを書くべき?境界値は何件必要?
cases.notes: Japanese-language request to size test coverage and boundary values for a payment-module change.

cases.prompt: Write an E2E browser test for the checkout flow
cases.notes: E2E browser test strategy is outside unit-test-design's boundary; it only owns the delegation decision itself.

cases.prompt: Set up the embedded battery-drain measurement harness
cases.notes: Embedded NFR measurement harnesses route to embedded-nfr-harness-design, not unit-test-design.
